Solar Panel Savings Calculator

Calculate your potential solar panel savings. Enter your electricity bill and system details to see payback period and long-term savings.

FAQ

How much do solar panels save?

Average US homeowners save $1,500-$2,500 per year on electricity with solar panels, or $37,500-$62,500 over 25 years.

What is the payback period for solar?

The average solar payback period is 6-10 years, after which electricity is essentially free for the remaining 15-20 years.

What tax credits are available?

The federal solar Investment Tax Credit (ITC) provides a 30% tax credit on the total system cost through 2032.
